'''''Fiery Dawn''''' was a [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] seen in [[Outpost 327]] during the [[Mission to Zhar]].

It intended to board the station while ''[[Sabra]]''{{'s}} commando team was slow in getting the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] ready for launch. This caused ''Sabra'' to be docked far longer and blocking freighter traffic with the outpost.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
